description_long: This is a stylized wooden storage box with a cubic shape, featuring prominent wood grain textures and reinforced corners. The box is constructed from planks with visible seams and metallic rivets at each corner, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance. The wood is a warm, medium brown with hand-painted details that mimic natural wood knots and swirls. The top surface is flat and bordered by a raised wooden frame, suggesting it can be stacked or used as a support surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, indicating a simple, utilitarian design. The box is reminiscent of classic crates used for shipping or storage in urban or industrial settings.
description: A stylized, cubic wooden storage box with visible wood grain, reinforced corners, and metallic rivets, evoking a classic crate design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat wooden panel with horizontal grain and four metallic rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view reveals diagonal wood grain on the panel, with the same reinforced corners and rivets.
description_view_2: Opposite side to view 0, nearly identical with horizontal wood grain and corner rivets.
description_view_3: Opposite side to view 1, featuring diagonal wood grain and reinforced corners with rivets.
